news_list.title: Japanese tanker carrying Saudi oil crosses Strait of Hormuz - The Korea Times
news_list.summary:
TOKYO -- Panama-flagged tanker Idemitsu Maru, carrying 2 million barrels of Saudi oil, crossed the Strait of Hormuz, LSEG shipping data showed on Tuesday, becoming the first Japan-linked crude tanker to do so since the Iran war began.

Before the U.S.-Iran conflict broke out on February 28 and disrupted Middle East crude oil and liquefied natural gas supplies, Japan relied on the region for 95% of its oil imports, much of it coming via the Strait of Hormuz.

The move comes as Japan's recent diplomatic efforts to safeguard energy supplies were disrupted by the war.

Earlier in April, the Sohar LNG tanker co-owned by Japan's Mitsui O.S.K. Lines and the Mitsui-owned LPG tanker , Green Sanvi, crossed the strait.

Idemitsu Maru, a very large crude carrier (VLCC), is managed by a unit of Japanese refiner Idemitsu Kosan.

Idemitsu Kosan declined to comment on individual ships.

The vessel was 30 kilometers (18.6 miles) east of Larak Island and moving eastward with its Automatic Identification System active, separate data from MarineTraffic showed.

HORMUZ TRAFFIC STAYS MUTED

Between 125 and 140 ships crossed in and out of the strait daily before February 28, but seven had sailed in the past day, including a general cargo ship Gulf King that sailed from Iran's Bandar Abbas anchorage and the Axion I liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) tanker, which is subject to US sanctions, according to Kpler ship-tracking data and satellite analysis from SynMax.

Other vessels included dry bulk ships and a chemical tanker, SynMax analysis showed.

An LNG tanker managed by UAE's ADNOC crossed Hormuz and was near India, ship-tracking data showed on Monday. If confirmed, it would be the first loaded LNG tanker to cross the strait since the war began. It was unclear when it sailed.

If Hormuz were to reopen by "tomorrow, we suggest that it will take until at least September for tanker and oil markets to return to something resembling 'normal,'" ship broker BRS said in a note this week.

U.S. President Donald Trump is unhappy with the latest Iranian proposal on resolving the two-month war, a U.S. official said, dampening hopes for a resolution soon.

news_list.title: This chip supercycle has one collective blind spot | MACAU DAILY TIMES 澳門每日時報
news_list.summary:
The chip industry seems to be the only game in town lately. The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index, known as the SOX, has risen 48% this year. Bourses in Taiwan, South Korea and Japan are riding the wave, brushing away potential energy shocks from the military conflict over Iran.

Investors can't get enough of chips. The Roundhill Memory ETF, where SK Hynix Inc., Samsung Electronics Co. and Micron Technology Inc. make up about 65% of the portfolio, launched on April 2 and has already attracted $1.4 billion in net inflows.

Some are now talking about an industry supercycle. As AI development shifts from training large-language models to applications, beneficiaries will broaden beyond Nvidia Corp. to include CPU and memory makers, as well as equipment suppliers.

Unlike previous cycles driven by consumer electronics, today's end clients are hyperscalers and cloud providers, whose commitments may be more stable and long-term. With better earnings visibility, one can argue the industry deserves higher valuations. Since the arrival of ChatGPT in late 2022, SOX has largely traded at a premium to the S&P 500, bucking historic trends.

This earnings season has strengthened that view. SK Hynix has pointed to excess demand over the next three years, while Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. raised its full-year outlook. Of the six SOX companies reporting first-quarter results, all delivered positive surprises.

Still, while these are strong tailwinds, investors may be getting carried away.

The market appears to be rewarding every chip company, as if a healthy backdrop will lift all boats. But there will be winners and losers. Of the 30 stocks on SOX, only one -- Qualcomm Inc. -- is in the red this year.

The rise of CPUs is a good example. As agentic AI applications such as OpenClaw emerge, analysts suggest data centers may eventually require one CPU per graphics processing unit, compared with one for every four today. The server CPU market could expand to $60 billion by 2030, up from $26 billion last year, according to Arm Holdings Plc. Last Friday, Intel Corp.'s shares jumped 24% on an earnings beat, lifting peers such as Advanced Micro Devices Inc. and Arm.

However, the competitive landscape for data-center CPUs remains unclear. Nvidia has launched its Vera CPU for agentic AI. Days later, Arm -- traditionally a licensing company -- moved to produce chips itself. AMD remains a formidable rival.

Whether Intel or Arm can gain market share is still uncertain, yet valuations suggest investors have already decided. Intel trades at 54 times estimated 2027 earnings, while Arm, 87% owned by SoftBank Group Corp., trades at 109 times.

More likely, investors are chasing high-beta plays. Factor analysis shows chip stocks outperformed in April largely due to the broader market rebound. Believing the TACO trade remains intact, investors have rushed to position for the next phase of the AI rally, making stock picking less relevant.

news_list.title: JETOUR G700 First Impression In Beijing China
news_list.summary:
We got to experience the acceleration of this G700 and its super luxury cabin

This is the Jetour G700 and it is a premium, full-size plug-in hybrid (PHEV) body-on-frame off-road SUV, featuring a 2.0L turbocharged engine and dual motors producing a massive 904 PS and 1,135 Nm of torque. This SUV offers an EV-only driving range with its battery system of up to 150km and a total driving range exceeding 1,000 km when the fuel tank and battery us full.

The cabin comes equipped with the Huawei Qiankun Intelligent Driving ADS 4.0 system, which uses Lidar and 4D millimeter-wave radars to assist in navigating complex off-road scenarios.

Despite its rugged exterior, the interior is positioned as a "high-tech sanctuary".Interior Materials: Features Nappa leather seating with massage functions.

The high luxury cabin is equipped with rear-seat entertainment screens and a premium sound system.

It is a a large vehicle measuring 5,153mm in length and 2,050mm in width, providing significant cabin space and an impressive footprint.

Off-Road Capability: Features full-time electric 4WD, air suspension, tank turn, and 900mm+ water wading depth. Has an impressive 230mm ground clearance and 900mm wading depth. Boasts a 35° approach angle and a 32.3° departure angle when fully raised.

Dimensions: Approximately 5,198 mm long, 2,050 mm wide, and 1,956 mm tall.

Design: Features a "rugged" and "intimidating" look, easily compared to premium off-roaders like the GWM Tank 500 and Denza B5.

Availability: Originally launched in China and the Middle East, with a potential release in Malaysia in late Q4 2026 as we were invited to test drive in Beijing just a week ago.

Selling Price: In China it retails from 329,900 yuan which is about RM190,000. (add logistic costs and import duties and this G700 could sell for just below RM299k).

news_list.title: Nissan unveils NEV SUV concepts at Auto China
news_list.summary:
NISSAN Motor Company unveiled two new energy vehicle (NEV) SUV concept cars at Auto China 2026, marking a significant step in its accelerated product rollout, and highlighting China's role as one of the company's lead markets and a global innovation and export hub supporting long-term growth.

Y K Almoayyed & Sons (YKA) is the sole distributor of Nissan vehicles in Bahrain, and said they are 'excited to witness these groundbreaking developments that directly influence the future of mobility in our region'.

"With Nissan's strategic focus on the Middle East as an export destination for models like the Frontier Pro PHEV and the upcoming Terrano PHEV, we anticipate bringing these innovative NEV technologies to Bahraini customers as part of Nissan's global electrification journey," YKA said in a statement.

"These advancements reinforce our confidence in Nissan's vision and our commitment to delivering cutting-edge mobility solutions that align with Bahrain's sustainability goals and our customers' evolving needs."

Nissan Motor Company president and chief executive Ivan Espinosa said: "Under our vision, China is not only a highly competitive domestic market but also a source of innovation, enabling us to create new value and experiences for customers in China and in the global markets.

"Advanced technology must serve a clear purpose and be experienced directly by customers through mobility that is safer, more intuitive, and more accessible. China is central to bringing this belief to life."

Nissan presented two NEV concept SUVs that demonstrate its accelerated NEV product offensive in China.

The Urban SUV PHEV Concept is designed for young Chinese customers. Its design draws from philosophies of the NX8 and Nissan's future SUV lineup, blending advanced electrification technology with urban daily driving performance.

The Terrano PHEV Concept marks the return of an iconic nameplate. Equipped with the latest plug-in hybrid technology, the Terrano builds on Nissan's off-road heritage while addressing the dual needs of outdoor adventure and urban commuting.

Production versions of both concept cars are scheduled to be unveiled within one year.

Nissan also plans to introduce three additional NEV models in China by fiscal year 2027, further accelerating its NEV expansion and brand transformation.

Nissan has unveiled its new vision - Mobility Intelligence for Everyday Life. Within this vision, China plays two distinct roles as Nissan's three lead markets, alongside Japan and the United States.

First, China serves as a strong domestic market, delivering clear and compelling value for Chinese customers.

Second, it functions as a global innovation and export hub, leveraging China's innovation and speed to develop competitive technologies and products globally.

Since 2025, Nissan has accelerated its NEV product offensive in China, including the N7, Frontier Pro PHEV, N6 and NX8. Combining Nissan's global quality standards, China speed and advanced local technologies, these models have earned strong recognition from Chinese consumers.

The N7 will be exported to Latin America and Asean, while the Frontier Pro is planned for export to Latin America, Asean and the Middle East.

The NX8 and the production model of the Terrano PHEV Concept are also intended for selected global markets.

Nissan aims to achieve one million units in annual sales in China by fiscal year 2030, with exports as a key strategic role.

While production models are yet to be unveiled, customers can visit the Nissan showroom in Bahrain to experience the brand's current lineup and stay informed on the latest developments in Nissan's electrification journey.

themes.name: 半導體與AI驅動科技股進入超級週期
themes.insight: 多份報告指出，由AI需求引爆的晶片超級週期正推動全球科技股上漲，特別是半導體指數（SOX）及台、韓、日相關股市。Nvidia、CPU、記憶體及設備商均被視為受益者，儘管市場對部分公司估值過高存有疑慮。
evidence: 2.半導體強勁引領，美股、亞洲科...
This chip supercycle has one collective blind spot | MACAU DAILY TIMES 澳門每日時報

themes.name: 中國成為全球新能源車的創新與出口中心
themes.insight: 於北京車展上，無論是中國自主品牌（如捷途 G700）或國際品牌（如日產），皆展示了其最新的新能源車（NEV）戰略。這突顯了中國不僅是關鍵的消費市場，更已成為全球汽車產業在技術創新、產品開發和未來出口方面的核心樞紐。
evidence: JETOUR G700 First Impression In Beijing China
Nissan unveils NEV SUV concepts at Auto China

themes.name: 中東地緣政治緊張，推升美元並影響能源供應鏈
themes.insight: 中東地區的持續動盪，特別是與伊朗相關的衝突，正對全球市場產生連鎖反應。一方面，不確定性推升了美元的避險需求，使其維持強勢；另一方面，行經荷姆茲海峽的油輪運輸受到干擾，引發對能源供應穩定性的擔憂。
evidence: 4.中東局勢動盪，美元維持強勢
Japanese tanker carrying Saudi oil crosses Strait of Hormuz - The Korea Times

themes.name: 日本央行利率決議在即，日圓走勢引發市場觀望
themes.insight: 在日本央行（BOJ）即將公佈最新利率政策前，市場情緒趨於謹慎。官方的口頭干預警告暫時限制了日圓的進一步貶值，導致匯率在關鍵決議公佈前陷入區間震盪，投資者密切關注任何可能改變貨幣政策方向的信號。
evidence: 1.BOJ利率決議前，日圓區間震盪

topics.topic: 半導體與AI驅動科技股進入超級週期
topics.summary: 多份報告指出，由AI需求引爆的晶片超級週期正推動全球科技股上漲，特別是半導體指數（SOX）及台、韓、日相關股市。Nvidia、CPU、記憶體及設備商均被視為受益者，儘管市場對部分公司估值過高存有疑慮。
evidence: 2.半導體強勁引領，美股、亞洲科...
This chip supercycle has one collective blind spot | MACAU DAILY TIMES 澳門每日時報

topics.topic: 中國成為全球新能源車的創新與出口中心
topics.summary: 於北京車展上，無論是中國自主品牌（如捷途 G700）或國際品牌（如日產），皆展示了其最新的新能源車（NEV）戰略。這突顯了中國不僅是關鍵的消費市場，更已成為全球汽車產業在技術創新、產品開發和未來出口方面的核心樞紐。
evidence: JETOUR G700 First Impression In Beijing China
Nissan unveils NEV SUV concepts at Auto China

topics.topic: 中東地緣政治緊張，推升美元並影響能源供應鏈
topics.summary: 中東地區的持續動盪，特別是與伊朗相關的衝突，正對全球市場產生連鎖反應。一方面，不確定性推升了美元的避險需求，使其維持強勢；另一方面，行經荷姆茲海峽的油輪運輸受到干擾，引發對能源供應穩定性的擔憂。
evidence: 4.中東局勢動盪，美元維持強勢
Japanese tanker carrying Saudi oil crosses Strait of Hormuz - The Korea Times

topics.topic: 日本央行利率決議在即，日圓走勢引發市場觀望
topics.summary: 在日本央行（BOJ）即將公佈最新利率政策前，市場情緒趨於謹慎。官方的口頭干預警告暫時限制了日圓的進一步貶值，導致匯率在關鍵決議公佈前陷入區間震盪，投資者密切關注任何可能改變貨幣政策方向的信號。
evidence: 1.BOJ利率決議前，日圓區間震盪

ai_analysis.full_text:
【今日結論】
今早台股開盤壓力沉重，預期將開低震盪。主因是昨夜美股科技股，尤其是費城半導體指數重挫 3.58%，台積電 ADR 也跟隨下跌 3.12%，這個明確的空方訊號，幾乎排除了台股跳空開高的可能性，市場焦點將完全集中在 AI 族群的賣壓與權值股的撐盤力道。
【新聞驅動】
市場的驅動主線是 OpenAI 財報不如預期，引發了對 AI 成長放緩甚至泡沫化的擔憂，這股疑慮從科技龍頭擴散至整個半導體供應鏈。同時，雖然原油價格昨夜回落，但仍處於高位，加上中東地緣政治緊張推升美元，潛在的通膨壓力與聯準會政策的不確定性，為市場增添了另一層風險。
【國際與台股】
美股昨夜全面收黑，Nasdaq 與費半指數分別下跌 0.90% 與 3.58%，直接衝擊台股相關供應鏈。儘管昨日日經指數 (+1.38%) 與韓股 (+0.12%) 表現相對穩定，但台積電 ADR 的顯著跌幅是更直接的盤前指標，預示著今日台股需優先消化來自美股的利空，而非期待延續亞洲市場的動能。
【KOL與情緒】
社群熱搜關鍵字集中在「OpenAI」與「OPEC」，反映市場對 AI 雜音與能源價格的高度敏感。籌碼面出現分歧，外資期貨連四天空單，而投信連十天多單，顯示內外資看法不一，資金可能正從中小型股轉向大型權值股避險，需留意盤中是否出現「拉積盤」穩住指數的現象。
【操作含意】
操作上，今日不宜追高，應保守觀察開盤後的賣壓消化情況，特別是台積電與 AI 概念股能否止跌回穩。在 AI 題材出現雜音之際，投資人應將焦點轉向具備基本面支撐、且較不受此波利空影響的族群，並密切關注外資與投信的籌碼流向，判斷市場資金是在撤退還是轉進防禦。

selected_charts.title: 科技主題熱度圖
selected_charts.description: 科技新聞主題與市場主線的熱度排名與來源證據。
selected_charts.takeaway: 科技新聞主線雖高度集中在『半導體與 AI 超級週期』，但昨夜費半指數重挫超過 3.5%，顯示此一市場主線正遭遇強大逆風，市場對 AI 成長的樂觀預期受到挑戰。
selected_charts.action: 關注半導體供應鏈相關個股的股價反應，以及是否有資金轉向非科技避險族群。

selected_charts.title: 社群熱度圖
selected_charts.description: PTT / Dcard / Google Trends 的熱門主題、速度與升溫強度。
selected_charts.takeaway: 社群熱度快速集中在『openai』與『費城半導體指數』，反映市場高度關注昨夜科技股的利空消息，負面情緒正在醞釀。
selected_charts.action: 留意相關主題的討論熱度是否持續升溫，這可能加劇盤中的波動與賣壓。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 科技新聞主線雖高度集中在『半導體與 AI 超級週期』，但昨夜費半指數重挫超過 3.5%，顯示此一市場主線正遭遇強大逆風，市場對 AI 成長的樂觀預期受到挑戰。
chart_commentary.action: 關注半導體供應鏈相關個股的股價反應，以及是否有資金轉向非科技避險族群。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 社群熱度快速集中在『openai』與『費城半導體指數』，反映市場高度關注昨夜科技股的利空消息，負面情緒正在醞釀。
chart_commentary.action: 留意相關主題的討論熱度是否持續升溫，這可能加劇盤中的波動與賣壓。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 今早台股開盤壓力沉重，預期將開低震盪。主因是昨夜美股科技股重挫，特別是費城半導體指數下跌 3.58%，台積電 ADR 也大跌 3.12%。市場擔憂 OpenAI 財報不如預期，可能引發對 AI 成長的疑慮，導致賣壓從科技龍頭擴散至整個半導體供應鏈。同時，中東地緣政治緊張推升美元走強，也為市場增添不確定性。今日焦點將集中在 AI 相關族群的賣壓，以及權值股是否能有效撐盤。

chart_gap_suggestions.chart_name: 台股大盤漲跌貢獻圖 (TW Index Contribution Panel)
chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 今日報告多次提及「權值股的撐盤力道」是觀察重點，但目前缺乏圖表能直接呈現大型權值股對指數的具體貢獻點數。此圖能清晰顯示是哪些股票在拉抬或拖累大盤，讓使用者能快速驗證「拉積盤」或「殺積盤」的盤勢結構。
data_needed: 各成分股的即時股價漲跌幅
計算後對大盤指數的漲跌貢獻點數
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: ai_summary: 『市場焦點將完全集中在 AI 族群的賣壓與權值股的撐盤力道。』

headline.teaser: **04/29 (三) 盤前速報：ADR 壓力顯現，AI 雜音成關鍵**
